package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
)

// scenario for error_logged_and_returned: `log.Error(err); return err` or `logger.Error("failed", zap.Error(err)); return fmt.Errorf("failed: %w", err)` - logging the error then returning it
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario409Positive(values []string) {
	for _, value := range values {
		log.Print(fmt.Sprintf("value=%s", value))
	}
}
